data.title: Telia Lietuva invests EUR 7.1 million to expand 5G and upgrade 500 base stations
data.description: In 2026, Telia Lietuva, AB will allocate €7.1 million towards enhancing its mobile network. The investment will cover the establishment of 50 fresh base stations, revamping 300 current sites, and enhancing about 130 more sites with new radio technology. Additionally, the Company will begin utilizing the 1,500 MHz spectrum obtained in a recent auction, to boost 5G network capacity and accommodate the rising mobile data usage.

data.title: EVE Energy Strengthens European Operations Through Compliance, Local Manufacturing, and Regional Services
data.description: The Smarter E Europe 2026 kicked off in Munich from June 23 to June 25, attracting key players in the clean energy industry to one of Europe’s leading trade show platforms. EVE Energy introduced its Mr. Big Family line, featuring a 6.9+ MWh energy storage system, versatile storage solutions, and top-tier EV batteries. The company spotlighted its lithium-sodium dual-tech platform, complete product range, and region-specific European operational setup.

data.title: Invitation to media and analyst briefing for Ericsson Q2 2026 report
data.description: The financial report for the second quarter of 2026 from Ericsson (NASDAQ: ERIC) is scheduled to be released at around 7:00 AM CEST on July 14, 2026. A live video webcast for analysts, investors, and journalists will follow at 9:00 AM CEST. The event is set to take place in STOCKHOLM.

data.title: SKF and Leaderdrive form a venture for precision components in humanoids
data.description: In Gothenburg, Sweden, on July 2, 2026, SKF and Leaderdrive (LD) recently announced a new partnership to create a joint venture in China. The collaboration will center on developing advanced transmission components for robot joints. This venture will aim to leverage SKF's expertise in precision engineering and LD's specialization in robotic components to cater to the growing demand for high-precision robot technology. This initiative underscores the significance of the Chinese market, with both companies keen on capitalizing on the increasing need for robotics in various industries.

data.title: New release 'Nothing Is Wrong With You' challenges conventional self-help narratives and reclaims personal agency
data.description: Kathryn Dawe delves into themes of identity and responsibility, highlighting how self-criticism may hinder personal growth. The exploration takes place in Spartanburg, S.C., during July 2, 2026. With the prevalent influence of social media and self-help sectors, individuals are pushed towards constant self-advancement and evolution. Dawe's insights provide valuable perspectives on the importance of self-acceptance in fostering genuine development.

data.title: Robinhood partners with Arcus, formerly dYdX, to introduce DEX Arcus for perpetual and tokenized stock trading on its new blockchain.
data.description: The decentralized finance platform dYdX has undergone a rebranding, now known as Arcus. This platform is set to become a part of Robinhood's latest blockchain initiative. Through this collaboration, Arcus aims to introduce perpetual trading and tokenized stocks to the market.

data.title: CoStar Group Announces Launch of CoStar Platform in France
data.description: In Paris, CoStar Group (NASDAQ: CSGP), a prominent company in real estate marketplaces and analytics, has unveiled the CoStar platform in France, marking its entry into one of Europe's major markets. As an S&P 500 business, CoStar is known for its 3D digital twin technology. This development follows CoStar Group's acquisitions of BureauxLocaux and Business Immo, underscoring its commitment to expanding its commercial real estate intelligence offerings. The company has made substantial investments in local research to bolster its presence in the region.
